prompt_log_directory: Log directory path (leave empty for default AppData folder):
prompt_json_layout: JSON log layout — 1 = pretty array (.json), 2 = NDJSON lines (.ndjson, faster for huge jobs):
prompt_log_destination_mode: Log destination mode — 1 = local only, 2 = central only, 3 = local + central:
prompt_central_endpoint: Central log endpoint URL (leave empty to keep current):
prompt_central_client_id: Central client id (leave empty = machine name):
prompt_large_threshold_kb: Large file threshold in KB (0 = disabled):
label_execution_busy: Another backup is already running — only one at a time is allowed.
label_preflight_source_missing: Source folder does not exist or is inaccessible.
label_preflight_target_denied: Cannot write to the target folder (access denied).
label_preflight_target_io: Cannot create or verify the target folder (I/O error).
label_done_errors: Completed with errors. Check the log file.
label_source_not_found: Error: Source directory does not exist.
label_name_exists: A job with this name already exists.
